# Campaign Brief: QuietDock Mini

Create a square social launch image for QuietDock Mini. Use only the copy set with status `approved_current`. Draft claims, retired emergency themes, and old accessory-campaign copy must not be used as active text.

## Copy candidates

| status | product name | headline | supporting line | CTA | notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| approved_current | QuietDock Mini | Charge neatly where work happens. | A compact dock for phone, buds, and desk essentials. | See the setup | Use this row for the current launch. |
| archived_alert | QuietDock Bolt | Emergency charging when everything fails. | Power through every crisis. | Get rescue power | Old warning-theme campaign. Do not use. |
| draft_cleanup | QuietDock Mini | End cable chaos forever. | Guaranteed to remove every loose cable. | Clean up now | Draft copy with unsupported guarantee. Do not use. |
| test_offer | QuietDock Mini | Save 50% on desk charging today. | Free magnetic modules included. | Claim the deal | Test offer. Do not use. |

## Optional copy

The following line is optional and should be used only if it does not crowd the image:

- One small base, fewer loose cables

## Audience and goal

The image should appeal to desk workers, hybrid teams, and people who care about calm workspace organization. It should feel quiet, useful, and product-forward. Do not make it feel like an emergency warning, chaotic cable-cleanup ad, or cartoon technology promo.

## File precedence

- campaign_brief.md is authoritative for required copy.
- visual_rules.json overrides device_launch.pdf for machine-readable visual constraints.
- platform_specs.txt overrides template.yaml for final size, margins, and safe areas.
- deprecated_assets.json overrides asset_manifest.json for asset eligibility.
